context.summary: The cashu-l402 project directory is completely empty — no source code, dependency files, configuration, documentation, or any project files exist beyond the .overnight orchestration infrastructure. The project name suggests an intended integration of the Cashu ecash protocol (Chaumian blinded signatures for Bitcoin Lightning) with L402 (HTTP 402 Payment Required protocol for Lightning-gated API access). This is a greenfield project that has not yet been started. No audits, code quality checks, or feature assessments are possible until code is written.

project_concept.cashu: Chaumian ecash protocol for Bitcoin — provides privacy-preserving tokens backed by Lightning Network payments (NUTs specification at cashubtc.github.io)
project_concept.l402: HTTP 402 Payment Required protocol — uses macaroons + Lightning invoices to gate API access behind micropayments (formerly LSAT)
project_concept.likely_intent: A service or library that combines Cashu ecash tokens with L402 authentication, enabling privacy-preserving API monetization via ecash payments instead of or alongside direct Lightning invoices

recommendations.note: No audits are applicable to an empty project. The workflow should either: (1) scaffold the project with chosen tech stack, or (2) halt and report that the project has no code to analyze.
